introSection: Carolina Goldrusher is a steel hybrid roller coaster located at Carowinds in Charlotte, North Carolina, USA. The ride opened with the park on March 31, 1973.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Olive green track and unpainted supports.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Carolina Goldrusher on the parks website

fullText:
Carolina Goldrusher is a steel hybrid roller coaster located at Carowinds in Charlotte, North Carolina, USA. The ride opened with the park on March 31, 1973.



Olive green track and unpainted supports.




 * Carolina Goldrusher on the parks website
